case_title: VIKRAM PATEL VS. PETER CHUNG LAM et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, VIKRAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAM, PETER CHUNG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 964 HOWARD ST. #S 17 S.F. CA. 94103 , CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, PETER CHUNG
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, VIKRAM AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, PETER CHUNG DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, VIKRAM SERVED MAY-11-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, PETER CHUNG
